changes.description: Added Step 0 branch verification (verify-only) and Step 0a merged branch cleanup. Renumbered steps 1-6. Strengthened spec-compliance fail gate with bold STOP instruction.
Restructured Step 0 as branch verification (verify-only, refuse main/master). Combined phase check into Step 1 preflight.
Added team delegation fallback to serial. Strengthened Step 3 error recovery: checkpoint on failure, max 2 retries, stop and report. Added partial completion guidance.
Added explicit escalation triggers to Step 1: >5 files, core data models, migrations, or unclear risk.
